headline: Goldman Sachs Group (GS) Could Be 8% Overvalued After Its Funding Push
summary: Goldman Sachs Group (GS) has been very active in its funding mix, announcing and completing a series of fixed income offerings across maturities from 2027 to 2046 with fixed coupons and callable structures. See our latest analysis for Goldman Sachs Group. Against this backdrop, Goldman Sachs Group’s recent 3.4% 1-day share price return and 22.1% 90-day share price return sit alongside a 1-year total shareholder return of 51.4% and a very large 3-year total shareholder return.
